name: Phoenix Rolls (Banh Phuong Hoang)
recipeIngredient: 10 Pieces of ham 2 inches by 1/2 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast into 5 thin slices.
2. In a mortar and pestle, smash the shrimp until it forms a paste. Add green onions, lemon grass, salt, and black pepper. Continue mashing until you have a smooth paste.
3. Lay a chicken fillet on a flat surface. Place a piece of ham at one end and top with 1/10 of the shrimp mixture.
4. Roll up the filling securely. Dip in cornstarch, then fry in oil until golden brown.
I have never tried this without the ham, but it seems like it might work.
